queries.question: What sales associates have a target market of B2C and what marketing specialists have the same target market?
queries.sql:
SELECT Position.title
FROM TargetMarket JOIN SalesAssociates ON TargetMarket.id = SalesAssociates.target_market_id JOIN Position ON Position.id = SalesAssociates.Position_id
WHERE TargetMarket.type = 'B2C'
UNION
SELECT Position.title
FROM TargetMarket JOIN MarketingSpecialists ON TargetMarket.id = MarketingSpecialists.target_market_id JOIN Position ON Position.id = MarketingSpecialists.Position_id
WHERE TargetMarket.type = 'B2C'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?targetmarket a :TargetMarket .
    ?salesassociates a :SalesAssociates .
    ?salesassociates p:hasTargetMarket ?targetmarket .
    ?position a :Position .
    ?salesassociates p:hasPosition ?position .
    ?position p:title ?title .
    ?targetmarket p:type ?type_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "B2C")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?targetmarket a :TargetMarket .
    ?marketingspecialists a :MarketingSpecialists .
    ?marketingspecialists p:hasTargetMarket ?targetmarket .
    ?position a :Position .
    ?marketingspecialists p:hasPosition ?position .
    ?position p:title ?title .
    ?targetmarket p:type ?type_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "B2C")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all sales associates and also provide a list of marketing specialists with a target market of B2C.
queries.sql:
SELECT Position.title
FROM TargetMarket JOIN SalesAssociates ON TargetMarket.id = SalesAssociates.target_market_id JOIN Position ON Position.id = SalesAssociates.Position_id
UNION
SELECT Position.title
FROM TargetMarket JOIN MarketingSpecialists ON TargetMarket.id = MarketingSpecialists.target_market_id JOIN Position ON Position.id = MarketingSpecialists.Position_id
WHERE TargetMarket.type = 'B2C'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?targetmarket a :TargetMarket .
    ?salesassociates a :SalesAssociates .
    ?salesassociates p:hasTargetMarket ?targetmarket .
    ?position a :Position .
    ?salesassociates p:hasPosition ?position .
    ?position p:title ?title .
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?targetmarket a :TargetMarket .
    ?marketingspecialists a :MarketingSpecialists .
    ?marketingspecialists p:hasTargetMarket ?targetmarket .
    ?position a :Position .
    ?marketingspecialists p:hasPosition ?position .
    ?position p:title ?title .
    ?targetmarket p:type ?type_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "B2C")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show sales associates and marketing specialists with a target market of B2C.
